notes: Templates use {variable} placeholders. Variables are resolved from the 'variables' section. Selection uses (dayOfYear + signIndex) mod templateCount for daily stability.

overall_zh: 今日的星光为你带来{quality_zh}的能量，适合{action_zh}。保持觉察，让直觉引领你前行。
宇宙今天为你准备了{quality_zh}的礼物，是{action_zh}的好时机。别忘了给自己一点温柔。
今日能量{quality_zh}，内心平静将是你最大的力量。试着{action_zh}，会有意想不到的收获。
星星今日轻声提醒你：{quality_zh}的时刻里，{action_zh}能让你更接近自己真正想要的生活。
今天是{quality_zh}的一天，适合{action_zh}。无论发生什么，记得照顾好自己的内心。
overall_en: Today's starlight brings you {quality_en} energy, perfect for {action_en}. Stay aware and let your intuition guide the way.
The universe has prepared a gift of {quality_en} energy for you today—a great time to {action_en}. Don't forget to be gentle with yourself.
Today's energy is {quality_en}. Inner peace will be your greatest strength. Try to {action_en} and unexpected rewards may follow.
The stars gently remind you today: in moments of {quality_en} energy, choosing to {action_en} can bring you closer to the life you truly want.
Today is a {quality_en} day, well-suited for {action_en}. Whatever happens, remember to tend to your inner world.
love_zh: 爱的能量今天{love_energy_zh}，{love_single_zh}单身者而言，{love_paired_zh}对于已有伴侣的你。
今日星象提示：在亲密关系中，{love_advice_zh}。真实表达内心，往往比完美表现更动人。
love_en: In love, there is a {love_state_en} quality flowing today. {love_advice_en}
Love energy today is {love_energy_en}. For singles: {love_single_en}. For those partnered: {love_paired_en}.
Today's stars suggest: in intimate relationships, {love_advice_en}. Genuine expression often moves hearts more than perfection.
career_zh: 事业方面的能量今日{career_energy_zh}，{career_advice_zh}。抓住机会，但也注意劳逸结合。
今日职场星象：{career_state_zh}。{career_advice_zh}，稳步前进是最明智的选择。
career_en: In work and studies, today brings {career_state_en} energy. {career_advice_en}
Career energy today is {career_energy_en}. {career_advice_en}. Seize opportunities but remember to balance effort and rest.
Today's professional stars: {career_state_en}. {career_advice_en}—steady progress is the wisest choice.
wealth_zh: 金钱能量今天{wealth_energy_zh}，{wealth_advice_zh}。理性消费，量入为出。
wealth_en: Money energy today is {wealth_energy_en}. {wealth_advice_en}. Spend rationally and within your means.
social_en: The energy in relationships today is {social_energy_en}. {social_advice_en}
advice_en: The stars want to remind you today: {advice_en}.

action_zh: 给自己一段安静的独处时光
尝试一件之前一直想做的事
action_en: have a heart-to-heart with a trusted friend
try something you've always wanted to do
slow down and observe your surroundings
love_advice_zh: 主动表达关心往往比等待更有效。
给彼此多一点耐心，关系自然会流动。
今天适合说出那句一直放在心里的话。
不必急着做决定，让感情自然发展。
love_advice_en: Expressing care proactively is often more effective than waiting.
Give each other a bit more patience—relationships naturally flow.
Today is a good day to say what you've been holding in your heart.
No need to rush a decision—let things develop naturally.
love_single_zh: 保持开放的心态，美好的相遇往往在意想不到时
今天适合独自享受当下，单身也是一种完整
love_single_en: keep an open heart—beautiful encounters often come when least expected
today is good for enjoying the present solo—being single is a kind of wholeness
love_paired_zh: 一个小小的惊喜能让关系更有温度
深入倾听对方，比说话更重要
love_paired_en: a small surprise can warm the relationship
listening deeply to your partner matters more than speaking
career_advice_zh: 今天适合完成积压的任务，而不是开始新项目。
在会议或沟通中，倾听比发言更有价值。
把精力放在最重要的一件事上，而不是同时做很多。
今天的努力会在未来某个时刻开花结果。
career_advice_en: Today is better for finishing backlogged tasks than starting new projects.
In meetings or conversations, listening is more valuable than speaking.
Put your energy into the one most important thing, not many at once.
Today's efforts will bear fruit at some point in the future.
wealth_advice_zh: 今天不是大手笔消费的好时机，把那笔钱留着。
关注自己真正需要的，而不是一时的冲动购买。
财运的积累在于日常的点滴，今天从小处做起。
wealth_advice_en: Today isn't the best time for big spending—keep that money for later.
Focus on what you truly need, not impulse purchases.
Wealth accumulates in small daily steps—start with something small today.
social_advice_zh: 今天联系一位久未相见的朋友，也许会有意外的惊喜。
在团队中，真诚比圆滑更能赢得信任。
适当拒绝不适合自己的邀请，照顾好自己的能量。
social_advice_en: Reach out to a friend you haven't seen in a while—there may be a pleasant surprise.
In teams, sincerity builds more trust than cleverness.
It's okay to decline invitations that don't suit you—protect your energy.
advice_zh: 别忘了喝水，关心身体是关心灵魂的第一步
今天适合比平时早一点休息
给自己五分钟，什么都不做，只是呼吸
写下今天让你感到感激的一件小事
把手机放下，看看窗外的天空
advice_en: Remember to drink water—caring for your body is the first step in caring for your soul
Consider resting a little earlier than usual today
Give yourself five minutes to do nothing but breathe
Write down one small thing you are grateful for today
Put down your phone and look at the sky outside your window
